info.description: Organization-wide project & issue tracking API (Jira-class, org-scoped).
info.title: Cairn API

get.description: Redirects to the provider (google or microsoft) authorization endpoint.

post.description: Uses the httpOnly refresh cookie to mint a new access token (and rotate the refresh token).

get.description: Org-wide issue list with optional filters: space (key), assignee ("me" or user id), status.

parameters.description: Filter by assignee (me or user id)
parameters.name: assignee

parameters.description: Fields to change (send empty assignee_id to unassign)
parameters.name: body

patch.description: Apply partial changes to several statuses of a space at once (e.g. reorder columns). Each item is matched by id.

get.description: Allowed issue status transitions for a space. An empty list means an open workflow (any status to any other).

put.description: Replace a space's entire set of allowed status transitions. Send an empty list to reset to an open workflow. A null from_status_id is a global "from any status" transition.

billing_enabled.description:
BillingEnabled starts a subscription/trial for the org. Honored only when
the creator is a platform admin; ignored otherwise.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the access token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
